info.title: LHC_Jets_Dataset_Normalised
info.description: This is my created normalised dataset for PHAS0056 Mini-project E: LHC Jets. It was normalised on my local PC and uploaded to Kaggle cloud for running later GPU code. The original dataset can be found on the public LHC jet database hls4ml_LHCjet_100p_train.tar.gz (https://zenodo.org/records/3602254).
